entry.summary:

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,666Chapters: 1/12Kudos: 1

Summary: Merlin teaches Arthur how to be gay and regrets it over the course of the year.

entry.title: The Price
entry.summary:
Author: dante0220

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 84,771Chapters: 57/?Kudos: 30

Summary: In the "Wicked Day", Merlin tries to save Uther's life. As Emrys, he tries to cast the healing spell. Unfortunately, Morgana's necklace contains an *extra* twist. As both healing spell and aging spell go wrong, Merlin is forced to flee. Kilgarrah takes him to safety. Mithian and Rodor grant him sanctuary. There Merlin realizes still more about his secondary royal destiny.

entry.title: King & Court
entry.summary:
Author: BeautifulFiction

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 328,346Chapters: 70/110Kudos: 3,212

Summary: Loneliness is an insidious thing. When Merlin looks at Arthur, he sees not just a prince waiting for his time to rule, but a young man struggling to find his place in the world, with little help from anyone else. The truth is, Arthur needs more than the friendship Merlin can offer. He needs people he can trust: men and women who will become his court and his confidants, and if he is going to survive to take the throne and lead Camelot into its golden age, he needs them sooner rather than later. Finding loopholes in Uther’s laws is no easy feat. Court life is a dangerous game, but it’s one Merlin has every intention of winning so that Arthur can have knights of his choosing by his side. And then there is the matter of his magic…

entry.title: Within Four Walls
entry.summary:
Author: Oakfiddle

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,916Chapters: 3/9Kudos: 17

Summary: Merlin and his mum wans to move away from Ealdor to get a fresh start, to leave his mum's abusive ex-boyfriend behind.They go to Camelot to look at a flat. His mum falls in love with the flat, and Merlin falls in love with the property manager, who also happens be the landlord's son.Why can't life be simple for once?

entry.title: Soldier, Servant, Poet, King
entry.summary:
Author: Grammar_Beane

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,167Chapters: 20/24Kudos: 182

Summary: Arthur and Merlin were just going on a hunting trip. It was meant to be a nice, easy trip through the woods around Camelot. It ended with them being chased by an unknown monster into an unknown cave, stepping out into an unknown world. Maybe the weird bard and the magic monster hunter they found in the woods could help? Jaskier and Geralt were on their way north for the winter—Jaskier to Oxenfurt, Geralt to Kaer Morhen. But they were still a ways away when two odd men claiming to be from a place called “Camelot” stumbled into them. Geralt immediately learned Merlin has magic, and Jaskier could see the chemistry between the pair from a mile away. Arthur wanted to get back to Camelot.Merlin wanted to get back to Camelot, and stay alive while his magic seemed intent on acting bizarre.Geralt wanted to travel with Jaskier.Jaskier wanted to travel with Geralt, and get those two idiots to confess everything. It took some time, but they all got what they wanted. More or less.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Once And Future Kings
entry.summary:
Author: prettybuckybaby

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,402Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 629

Summary: “Father,” The young prince whines, eyes wide, looking up at the King and Queen with a look of disbelief on his face. “You can’t send me there!”“Merlin,” Balinor sighs from his place on his throne. “It is your destiny to protect Arthur Pendragon and unite the lands of Albion. I do not understand how you hope to achieve that by remaining in Spero,”“B... But it’s Camelot!” Merlin is shrieking now, hands pulling at his hair in terror. Hunith looks sadly at her son as she stands up, holding out her hands for the teen to take. “Uther, he could…... I could be killed!”------------In which Merlin is secretly a Prince of a magical kingdom, and has come to Camelot to fulfill his destiny and protect Arthur Pendragon.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Merlin's Week off
entry.summary:
Author: wallacepark

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,645Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 27

Summary: “As an offering of my gratitude for your loyalty and hard work, you all have a week off, relieved of all your duties, starting the moment we step foot in Camelot.” The camp erupted with cheers and chants of Long live the king and he bit back a smile as he tried to contain their excitement. Merlin emerged from where he was perched by the fire with the pot of soup. “Does all duties include serving the king?” he asked, batting his eyes, glassy, pupils blown and lit by the fire. Arthur couldn’t help the smile that tugged at his lips, of course Merlin wanted a day off. “Go on then." [OR Arthur gives his knights and merlin the week off for their hard work and it turns out to be a grave mistake because he ends up actually missing them]

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: if by the sun and moon i swore
entry.summary:
Author: theleftoveryou

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,113Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 42

Summary: “Maybe,” said Arthur. “I’ve thought of that possibility myself. But there were only a very few people who knew.” He held up a hand, almost as though to count on his fingers. “Myself, Morgana, a few of my father’s closest advisors. Gaius.” He paused. “You.” His expression grew solemn. “Should I be worried that you’re the spy?” “What? No! I would never betray you.” “But you’re sure you didn’t let something slip?” “Of course not.” Merlin’s voice grew heated. “I told no one.” Arthur raised his own voice in response. “Really, Merlin? Because I don’t think you could keep a secret if your life depended on it.” ---------- Merlin lets it slip that he has a secret. Arthur misinterprets.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: True of Heart
entry.summary:
Author: SprinkleHatesEverything

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 426Chapters: 1/6Kudos: 4

Summary: "Since that day, magic began to occupy his thoughts more and more. Magic lived on in such a mundane way that Lancelot had a difficult time imagining who exactly it was that Uther had been fighting. Magic was everywhere, magic was in the heart of Camelot itself. Uther was definitely turning in his grave." OR Lancelot Du Lac is a selfless and honourable man with a strong sense of morality. He became a knight to defend and help the people around him. But when he starts to realise that he is complicit to a great injustice, as a feeling of helplessness starts to grip his heart as he watches his magical friend sacrifice himself from the shadows, he realises something needs to change

entry.title: Losing or gaining control (is sometimes closer to each other than you think)
entry.summary:
Author: sword_and_shield_22

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 249,708Chapters: 58/58Kudos: 181

Summary: Merlin has never learnt to control his magic. It is completely guided by his emotions and that usually doesn't turn out well.Arthur was chased out of Camelot as a young prince. His own sister killed their father and now he is just waiting for the right moment to reclaim his kingdom.When Merlin and Arthur meet, a hope seems to take root in the world that all will be well.Magical figures, dark magic, lies and betrayal make their experiences together anything but easy. But deep friendships, trust, loyalty and love bring them ever closer to their goal.Will Merlin find the control he needs and can Arthur forget his past to open his heart?

entry.title: When destiny gives you second chances
entry.summary:
Author: justs0me_randomauth0r

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,324Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 12

Summary: Destiny plays a cruel game with us. It lets us hope, lets us believe we are in control, just for things to end the way we knew they would anyways. But sometimes, to it’s very favorites, destiny will be kind. One of those favorites is Merlin. And what if this time it will actually end differently? What if this time he would find a way to show Morgana that violence was not the only option? What if this time, he could help Mordred not loose his loyalty. What if this time he could be honest with this man earlier on? Share his secret with him and show what magic can also be. Show him the beauty and peace it can bring. And what if this time he could build the courage to tell Arthur how he truly felt, before it will be too late again? If he could do all those things, could the ending truly be changed? Could he watch Arthur be the king he was destined to be instead of watching the love of his life die in his arms without him ever truly knowing what he meant for the young warlock? Merlin wasn’t sure. Anything he had ever done to try and change the cause of events had led to the exact situations he tried to avoid. But if destiny gives you a chance like this, you use it. Even if it may just mean reliving your losses once again…

entry.title: [Art] Elsewhere || ǝɹǝɥʍǝslƎ
entry.summary:
Author: Cactus_Is_Trash

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 14

Summary: On the night that Arthur learns of Merlin’s magic, a witchfinder is brought to Camelot. Fearing for his life and his chances of escape from the castle, Merlin turns to his last option. To travel through Nimheu’s Mirror, an indestructible artefact left behind when Nimheu fled Camelot at the start of the purge, said to have taken sorcerers away from the fear of the pyre, never to be seen again. On the other side, Merlin does not quite find the safe haven he was expecting. He is back in Camelot. But not his Camelot. An older Camelot, a harsher Camelot, with an older and harsher King to rule her. He cannot go back, he can only go on. But how? And what will his own Camelot do without him? Art for BBC Merlin RVBB 2025-2026.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)
  • Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)

entry.summary:
Author: Cactus_Is_Trash

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 51,809Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 13

Summary: On the night that Arthur learns of Merlin’s magic, a witchfinder is brought to Camelot. Fearing for his life and his chances of escape from the castle, Merlin turns to his last option. To travel through Nimueh’s Mirror, an indestructible artefact left behind when Nimueh fled Camelot at the start of the purge, said to have taken sorcerers away from the fear of the pyre, never to be seen again. On the other side, Merlin does not quite find the safe haven he was expecting. He is back in Camelot. But not his Camelot. An older Camelot, a harsher Camelot, with an older and harsher King to rule her. He cannot go back, he can only go on. But how? And what will his own Camelot do without him?

entry.title: How Fatherhood Changes a Man (and Certain Policies of State)
entry.summary:
Author: mayoInYourWalls

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 48,285Chapters: 10/20Kudos: 36

Summary: Most everyone Merlin knew warned him that nothing good would ever come of his little (though astonishingly requited) crush on the Lady Morgana. Merlin was, as of now, finding himself in agreement, as she made her dramatic return to Camelot one year after Merlin had attempted to kill her with hemlock. But when Merlin discovers the child, his child, he can say at least one very good thing, as well many more exceedingly ridiculous and complicated things, certainly had come of it. Featuring pervasive passive aggression and a general sense of melancholy, an extended and distinctly non peaceful political process to legalising magic, a not entirely willing family trip to Ealdor, and some foreign diplomatic negotiations somewhat lacking in diplomacy.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Lancelot/Merlin (Merlin)
  • Gwaine/Merlin (Merlin)
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)

  • Morgana Knows about Merlin's Magic (Merlin)

  • Disaster exes
  • Nuanced Morgana
  • Parent Merlin (Merlin)

  • Immortal Merlin (Merlin)
  • Art

entry.title: Different Destiny: The Outlaw Prince
entry.summary:
Author: tansyuduri

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 92,817Chapters: 19/25Kudos: 208

Summary: When Merlin's magic is exposed shortly before season 2 starts, the path of destiny starts changing forever. Now on the run with Arthur, Morgana, and Gwen. Merlin hopes to convince Arthur that magic is totally good instead of him and Morgana just being an exception. Morgana, meanwhile, hopes to convince him to usurp his father. As allies are gathered and Arthur realizes the injustice in his kingdom, it looks more and more like he will have to act in a drastic way. A way he dreads.   Meanwhile, Arthur and Merlin are growing closer and closer and might just have feelings for each other. Something they probably should be better about realizing, considering the example of Gwen and Morgana right next to them.   In a land of myth and a time of magic, the destiny of a great kingdom now rests on the shoulders of four, their names: Merlin, Arthur, Guinevere, and Morgana

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: As beautiful as in our dreams
entry.summary:
Author: Linowish

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,023Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 14

Summary: After season 1, we said "I wish it was like this" and I wanted to try it too.   Merlin was getting really tired and continuing with his life without receiving any thanks; it was very difficult.Arthur was like everyone around him; everyone saw him only as a prince, no one saw him as a friend, except Merlin.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
